methods.description: Process for collecting and preserving samples from a temporary stream for later analysis.

steps.description: Samples were collected by using the GR-91 rod bottom scoop (coverage area 0.007 m2).
steps.searchable_summary: collect samples using GR-91 rod bottom scoop

steps.description: Samples were sorted out and species identified at the laboratory.
steps.searchable_summary: sort and identify species in samples

methods.description: Measurement of environmental parameters in situ during sample collection.

steps.description: Water temperature (°C), pH, and electrical conductivity were measured in situ using a portable YSI Multi-Plus professional equipment.
steps.searchable_summary: measure water temperature, pH, and conductivity in situ

methods.description: Characterization of the community structure using a classification system.

steps.description: To characterize the structure of the community, we used the classification of Cheltsov-Bebutov modified by Levanidov.
steps.searchable_summary: classify community structure using Cheltsov-Bebutov system

methods.description: Photographic documentation of samples using specialized equipment.

steps.description: Photographs were taken with the stereomicroscope Olympus SZX16 and digital camera Olympus DP74, and stacked using Helicon Focus software.
steps.searchable_summary: take and stack photographs using Olympus SZX16 and DP74
